SELECT xslt_format_number(value, '0.0') FROM numbers WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.value, xslt_format_number(a.value, '#,###') AS formatted_value FROM numbers a JOIN numbers b ON a.value + b.value > 100;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT xslt_format_number(value, '0.0') AS formatted FROM numbers WHERE value < 50) AS subquery;
SELECT xslt_format_number((SELECT AVG(value) FROM numbers), '#,###') AS average_formatted_value;
